title: cnidium apioides subsp. reichenbachii
intro: Cnidium apioides subsp. reichenbachii, also known as Cnidium fruit or She-Xiang, is a type of plant native to China and other parts of Asia, belonging to the Apiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to enhance male fertility and alleviate symptoms of impotence and low libido. The health benefits of Cnidium apioides subsp. reichenbachii include its potential to increase sperm count and motility, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is often used in traditional Chinese medicine, prepared into herbal supplements and extracts, which can be consumed in capsule or powder form, or brewed as a tea for its medicinal benefits.
